exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 4 hotels: Arizona Biltmore (AZ), Oceana Santa Monica (CA), Crockfords Las Vegas (NV), Hotel 1000 Seattle (WA)

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest during 2024
Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Cherry Bekaert LLP. Balance sheets (2024, 2023), income statements (2024, 2023, 2022), cash flows (2024, 2023, 2022), 9 notes.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: Standard Hilton template with blank fields (brand, state, city, facility ID). Includes Shared Facilities Addendum.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 12 state/territory addenda: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Puerto Rico, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Contingent liability note for development incentives. Repayable amount decreases annually over term.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty. May include spouse. Scope determined after financial review of application.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: Application form including Part 1 (form) and Part 2 (application letter).

exhibits.name: Term Sheet
exhibits.notes: Binding terms sheet signed before or with Franchise Agreement.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: OnQ system agreement with HSS. Includes Order Document, Schedules A-D. Runs concurrent with FA.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents - Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Brand Standards manual TOC including sections on technology (700 series), operations, food & beverage, etc.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: List of state franchise administrators and agents.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: State-specific FDD addenda for: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: 8 StiR Creative Collective restaurant brands: Poppy's, Bronco Blanco, Haley & Bear, The Comeback, Che Vita, Magnolia Smokehouse, Spencer's, Piebird. Not offered for LXR.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Multiple forms including standard comfort letter, mezzanine lender comfort letter, assignment forms.
